models.name: gemma3:latest
models.use_case: Fast image understanding and text generation
models.notes: Only vision capability; no tool calling or reasoning

models.name: deepseek-r1:70b
models.notes: Large reasoning model; NO vision support (pure reasoning)

models.name: qwen3-vl:8b
models.notes: Most versatile small model; visual agent with tool calling

models.name: huihui_ai/qwen3-vl-abliterated:8b
models.notes: Same size as qwen3-vl but with modified training

models.name: qwen3.5:122b
models.use_case: Multimodal reasoning with full agent capabilities
models.notes: Largest model; all capabilities; highest accuracy

models.name: gpt-oss:120b
models.notes: No vision; optimized for reasoning and tool use

models.name: qwen3-coder-next:q8_0
models.notes: Non-thinking mode only; optimized for tool calling without reasoning overhead

recommendations.balanced_general_use: qwen3:30b - good reasoning capability with moderate size
recommendations.fast_multimodal: gemma3:latest or qwen3-vl:8b - both fast with vision
recommendations.full_capability_small: qwen3-vl:8b - most versatile in lightweight class
recommendations.best_accuracy: qwen3.5:122b - highest quality across all tasks
recommendations.reasoning_only: deepseek-r1:70b - best pure reasoning without vision
